# Open Issues

[Back to runtime actor boundary](../runtime-actor-boundary.md)

The roadmap document `docs/50-roadmap/open-questions.md` owns the broader open-question backlog. This surface keeps only C4 RuntimeActor boundary issue ids.

- `Q-RT-001` and legacy `Q-MULTICA-005` are closed by the runtime actor boundary.
- `Q-CTX-001` is closed by runtime actor and adjacent contract boundaries.
- `Q-RT-003` is closed by provider stdin command ACL.
- `Q-RT-005` is closed by provider session preservation.
- `Q-RT-002` remains open for provider process crash versus lease handoff ordering.
- `Q-RT-004` remains open for wrapper manifest standard location and format.
- `Q-RT-006` remains open for experimental Codex app-server surfaces such as `thread/fork`.
